dialogos.texto_en: Blue sky! The white sandy beach!
The emerald green sea!
This is Okinawa!!
Futaro's so excited...
Well, it can't be helped, right?\nWith such an amazing view in front of us,\nand his relationship going soooo well, right?
...Nino.\nCould you please keep those kinds of comments\nto yourself?
Futaro-kun,\nhow about your thoughts on your girlfriend's swimsuit?
I-I-Ichika?!
Well, um...
...What's that?
Just give an honest opinion.\nCome on!
Ah... It looks great on you.
Thank you...
Encore!
That's enough! It's fine, really!
You guys are messing with us, right?
Oh, come on, this is harmless fun, isn't it?
Now then, what should we do?\nWe could swim or try some activities!
Hey, I have something I want to do, is that okay?
Sure!\nGo ahead, Uesugi-san!
(I did some research beforehand.\n There should be that kinda activity available here!)
Snorkeling.
Snorkeling!\nSounds great!
I actually wanted to go scuba diving, but\nit seems too difficult for beginners.
Wow, Futaro-kun, you're pretty active.
W-well, it's not a big deal.\nI may be more of an indoor person, but\nwe're in Okinawa now, aren't we?
I think it sounds like a lot of fun\nto explore under the sea.
I'm in agreement too.
Me too!
Alright then, it's decided.\nIt looks like the registration\nis over there, so let's go.
Yeah.
Um, Uesugi-kun?
What is it?
Could it be that your suggestion now\nis because I said\nI wanted to swim with sea turtles...
Well... I guess that's it.\nIt was the same when we did projection mapping,\nwasn't it?
Could it be that your suggestion now\nis related to the time we saw the projection mapping...?
Ah, yeah, that's right.\nYou had a look on your face\nlike you wanted to swim with sea creatures.
I knew it...\nYou really are...
Ahh! You don't have to say anymore!
(If I blush too much,\n they'll make fun of me even more!)
Well then, just one thing.\nThank you so much.
...No prob.
(Oh...\n It's my first time seeing coral up close!)
(And there are so many fish swimming close by us!\n Are they used to people?)
(Oh! The fish are gathering by Itsuki.\n Haha, she looks surprised.)
(She's smiling...\n She seems so happy.\n Maybe suggesting snorkeling was worth it.)
(Seeing Itsuki so happy like this, I%p-2;――%p;)
(Hold on, am I just staring at Itsuki\n instead of the fish?!)
(...Well, that's okay, too.)
Snorkeling was so much fun!\nThe underwater world is so beautiful.
Yes, it was beyond imagination.
The water was so clear,\nI could see far into the distance.
Most of all, I was so moved\nthat I got to play with the fish.\nI never thought they would swim up to me like that!
Yeah, I was surprised to see how friendly they were.
Yes, me too! It felt like they were welcoming us.
Surrounded by colorful fish in the shining sea...\nI'll never forget that sight.
However, we couldn't meet any sea turtles, huh.\nI had my hopes up, just a little bit.
Sea turtles?
Yeah, Itsuki said before\nthat she wanted to swim with sea turtles.
Ahh, so...
The sea turtles will have to wait till next time.\nI'll proceed with earnest determination\nto get my diving certification.
Hey, so what are we going to do now?\nI'm a little tired and want to take a break.
Yeah, all right. Then let's take it easy\nand have some free time for a while.
Got it, let's do that.
I'm glad you seem satisfied.\nIt was worth proposing it.
Yes, it was one of the things\nI wanted to do in Okinawa.
Really?
Yeah, she wanted to swim with sea creatures in the ocean.
I see, so...
Hey, so what are we going to do now?\nI'm a little tired and want to take a break.
Yeah, all right. Then let's take it easy\nand have some free time for a while.
Got it, let's do that.
